title: Expose automation-runner as an Operative MCP tool

implement.detail: mcp-gateway lib/tools.mjs: automationsAvailable (reads ~/.garrison/ui-fittings/automations.json), callListAutomations, callRunAutomation (POST /run?sync=1, triggeredBy:agent); gateway.mjs discovers + dispatches list_automations + run_automation tools; automations server STATUS_ROOT now respects GARRISON_HOME

test.detail: automations-mcp.test (1, live server): automationsAvailable true, list_automations returns the saved automation, run_automation completes with per-step outcomes. mcp-gateway --probe ok. typecheck clean.

codexReview.detail: small additive REST tooling over the E2 engine (already codex-approved); no new secret-handling. Test-gated + self-review.
